questions.question: What is the main goal of target 4.7 of the 17 SDGs, related to life under threat from biodiversity loss?
options: A) To increase global renewable energy usage
B) To reduce greenhouse gas emissions
C) To protect 30% of land and sea areas by 2030
D) To halve the rate of biodiversity loss
questions.explanation: Target 4.7 aims to protect 30% of land and sea areas by 2030 to address biodiversity loss.

questions.question: What is the target of SDG 7 (Affordable and Clean Energy)?
options: A) Achieve 100% renewable energy
B) Increase global energy efficiency by 30% by 2030
C) Reduce greenhouse gas emissions by 45% by 2030
D) End the use of fossil fuels by 2050
questions.explanation: Target 7 aims to increase global energy efficiency by 30% by 2030 and promote access to affordable, reliable, sustainable and modern energy for all.

questions.question: What is the main goal of target 11.6 of the 17 SDGs, related to cities and sustainable infrastructure?
options: A) To increase global urban green spaces
B) To reduce urban poverty by 50% by 2030
C) To enhance the resilience of cities to natural disasters
D) To increase the use of renewable energy in urban areas
questions.explanation: Target 11.6 aims to enhance the resilience of cities to natural disasters by 2030.

questions.question: What is the target of SDG 12 (Responsible Consumption and Production)?
options: A) To halve per capita consumption and production by 2030
B) To increase global recycling rates by 30% by 2030
C) To reduce waste generation by 50% by 2030
D) To achieve 100% circular economy by 2050
questions.explanation: Target 12 aims to halve the rate of global waste by 2030 and achieve a 30% reduction in waste generation.

questions.question: What is the main goal of target 13.3 of the 17 SDGs, related to climate action?
options: A) To increase global carbon pricing
B) To enhance climate change governance and accountability
C) To increase global climate change mitigation efforts by 30% by 2030
D) To achieve carbon neutrality by 2050
questions.explanation: Target 13.3 aims to enhance climate change governance and accountability by 2030.
